name: Disabled Macroautophagy Outlook
main_blockers: The field still needs stronger evidence that people function better, not just evidence that autophagy targets changed.
best_current_signals: Autophagy-linked programs can already point to human biomarker movement in several adjacent tracks.
forecast_note: This hallmark benefits from overlap with nutrient sensing and mitochondrial maintenance, but clear public proof of long-lasting benefit is still limited.
